summary_en: 30,000 shares (0.56% of S/O) | ¥52.5M upper limit | ¥1,750/share implied ceiling | May 18 – Aug 12, 2026 | Open-market purchase on TSE
title_en: Notice regarding determination of matters related to acquisition of treasury shares (acquisition of treasury shares pursuant to articles of incorporation based on Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: Project Holdings Inc. resolved at its board meeting on 15 May 2026 to acquire treasury shares under Company Law Article 156 (as applied through Article 165, Paragraph 3). The authorization permits acquisition of up to 30,000 ordinary shares (0.56% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥52.5 million, implying a ceiling price of approximately ¥1,750 per share. Purchases will be executed via open-market trading on the Tokyo Stock Exchange during the window 18 May to 12 August 2026. The stated rationale is to enhance shareholder returns, improve capital efficiency, and preserve flexibility for future capital allocation including stock-based compensation programs. As of 31 March 2026, the company held 163,327 treasury shares against 5,324,123 shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock).
